description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser empower metamagic rod 9,000 gp Empower metamagic rod 32,500 gp Greater empower metamagic rod 73,000 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are empowered as though using the Empower Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Empower Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser empower metamagic rod 4,500 gp Empower metamagic rod 16,250 gp Greater empower metamagic rod 36,500 gp
